goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt artifact builder for release governance approved action consume execution receipt record audit receipt authorities without merges, PRs, GitHub calls, receipts, audits, durable writes, or external release actions.
scope_out: Do not write receipts or audits, perform durable writes, consume approved actions, merge, open PRs, call GitHub, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Release audit receipt authority artifacts can produce an in-memory audit receipt artifact without merge, PR, or GitHub action.
Recorded-at ref and audit receipt evidence ref are required.
Audit writes, merge, external actions, action consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit receipt persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Receipt write, audit persistence, durable write, approved action consumption, merge, PR creation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-178 produced side-effect-free release audit receipt authority artifacts.
